prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response:
Oh no. I'm so sorry.

I'm here — whatever you need, whenever. If you want company, I can come over. If you want to talk, I'll pick up. If you just need someone to sit on the phone in silence with you, I'll do that too.

Thinking of you and your mum. I love you.
